text:
His for
tunes will increase steadily upto 40th
year. Till 51, there will be further in
crease in his wealth and he will live
upto 76. He will earn money through Dh.
2-3 sources and even by dealing in
conveyances from his 44th year, His son will also take up a business career
and, will earn a good fortune. The other children 'will be of average type. He
will have some troubles from his son-in-law and a few friends.
CHART194
The native will be a patient per
Dt. Mars
Sat Mer. son, and will trust all alike. He will
Sun Ven.
have brothers and sisters. As the Sun is
Jupt Moon conjunct Ketu, the father will be em
ployed in Government. As there is
Venus in the second to Ketu and the
Moon in 3rd, the father will be em
ployed in a position where he will
work for the salvation of souls through
the recitation of Mantras of the Sun.
Having Mars in the second shows the
father to be owning some landed property.
With Mercury in the second to Saturn, trade is the source of livelihood
for the native.
